title: lasianthus sabahensis
intro: Lasianthus sabahensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Theaceae, native to Sabah in Malaysia. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues. Traditionally, Lasianthus sabahensis is prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture for herbal remedies, often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
